building_set: subsets S of finite target marks with 2<=|S|<=n-2; the omitted mark is infinity
compatibility: S subset T, T subset S, or S disjoint T
experiment: wonderful pullback of the labelled stable-target graph

pullback_rule.consequence: radial valuation walls are the first layer; residue collisions are later pulled-back diagonal centers in the same building set
pullback_rule.source_model: normalization of the principal component of the iterated blowups of the pulled-back diagonal ideals I_S
pullback_rule.target_model: the wonderful compactification Mbar_0,n of the labelled critical-value configuration
pullback_rule.tropical_model: saturated pullback of the tropical Mbar_0,n tree fan

scope: complete labelled stable-target graph and its nested-set and permutation combinatorics; the recursive resonance atlas separately constructs the polynomial admissible-cover component over it
